We have redesigned the landing page to be a full-screen, modern, and responsive page with a dark theme and gradient text. The navigation bar is fixed and translucent with hover effects. The landing page includes a large heading, a tagline, and a call-to-action button.

Additionally, I implemented a complex animated background using an HTML5 canvas with a particle network effect where particles move and connect with lines dynamically.

The page also includes a services section and footer consistent with the new style.
